arts.ttl: Manchester City star admits season has been ‘very difficult war’ – Struggling to accept what’s happened
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Bernardo Silva has admitted he can’t accept what has happened to them this season, having never experienced anything like it. Marca cover comments from the Portuguese international today made in an interview with DAZN about Manchester City’s struggles this season. Pep Guardiola’s side are on course for their worst campaign since 2015/16 The post Manchester City star admits season has been ‘very difficult war’ – Struggling to accept what’s happened appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: Manchester City visit the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium tonight as the midweek round of Premier League fixtures continues. Tottenham Hotspur host Manchester City in the Premier League tonight on the back of two consecutive wins since exiting the League Cup and FA Cup earlier this month.

arts.sum: Resurgent Spurs aiming to inflict a third straight loss on the reigning Premier League champions

arts.ttl: There's one Premier League team it makes perfect sense for Harry Kane to sign for ...and Tottenham fans should look away now, writes SIMON JORDAN
arts.sum: SIMON JORDAN: If Harry Kane decided to return to his country next season with a £54million buy-out clause, joining this rival would be a more sensible decision than returning to Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Man City eye Premier League star as long-term Kyle Walker replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking to continue their ongoing rebuild by sourcing a replacement for Kyle Walker, who is likely to have played his last game for the club.

arts.ttl: Tottenham takeover update as Daniel Levy two 'demands' emerge amid sale claim
arts.sum: Daniel Levy is said to be pricing Tottenham Hotspur out of a potential takeover because of his high valuation and intention to remain involved in the club. The publication also alleges Levy is one of the reasons behind the lack of a buyer for Tottenham, per people familiar with the talks on a potential sale.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City are in North London to take on Tottenham in the Premier League, where a win will strengthen their top four chances.
